name: Captured Tank
uniques: Comment [This is a captured tank from [Soviet]]
[This Unit] takes [10] damage <upon turn end> <in [non-[Soviet]] tiles> <when number of [Remaining [Soviet] Civilizations] is more than [0]>
Unable to pillage tiles <when number of [Remaining [Soviet] Civilizations] is more than [0]>
Can only heal by pillaging <when number of [Remaining [Soviet] Civilizations] is more than [0]>

name: Rescued Tank
uniques: Comment [This is our rescued tank from our enemies]

name: Heavy Charge
uniques: Comment [Can stun a [{non-[Stunned]} {Land}] unit for [2] turns by attacking it]
[Target Unit] gains the [Stunned] status for [2] turn(s) <when attacking> <upon damaging a [{non-[Stunned]} {Land}] unit> <hidden from users>

name: Heroism I
uniques: Earn [100]% of killed [Military] unit's [Strength] as [Golden Age points]

name: Heroism II
uniques: Earn [100]% of killed [Military] unit's [Cost] as [Golden Age points]

name: Defense Breaker
uniques: Comment [Destroys [Fort] when attacking and destroys [Citadel] when attacking with [50]% chance]
Destroys tile improvements when attacking <when fighting in [{Fort} {Foreign Land}] tiles> <hidden from users>
Destroys tile improvements when attacking <when fighting in [{Citadel} {Foreign Land}] tiles> <with [50]% chance> <hidden from users>

name: Combat
uniques: Comment [Gain XP when garrisoned in cities with a [Kilombo]]

name: Unable to found cities!
uniques: Triggers a [Force transform to Worker] event <upon turn start>
